song.title: Mary Poured Out Her Love Offering
song.author: Church in Seattle
song.presentation: V1 C1 V2 C2 V3 C3
song.lyrics:
[V1] .C D G Em Mary poured out her love off'ring . C D G G To many, such love was a waste .C D G Em Throughout all of the centuries . C C D Such lovers your sweetness do taste. .C D G Em Precious lives and heart treasures too, .C D G G Positions and golden futures, .C D G Em Have been "wasted" on you, Lord, .C D G G Your sweetness, a fragrance so sure.
[C1] .C D G Em She took opportunity . C D G G To love you Lord with her best. .C D G Em Like here, Lord, I too would pour . C D G G My love and all that I have. --- [V2] .C D G Em As I love you, I set my being, . C D G G My spirit, my soul and body, .C D G Em With my heart, my mind, and my strength . C C D Absolutely on thee. .C D G Em Lord, I let my entire being .C D G G Be occupied by Thee. .C D G Em As I enter in your heart .C D G G I sense a fellowship sweet
[C2] .C D G Em Occupied and lost in you, . C D G G My Lord, you're my everything. .C D G Em Fellowship so intimate . C D G G In spirit, Lord, I enjoy thee. -!! [V3] .C D G Em Lord, there's none in heav'n nor on earth . C D G G That I desire but thee. .C D G Em Though my heart and flesh faileth, Lord, . C C D Thou ever my portion will be. .C D G Em All is vanity, all is dung, .C D G G I count all other things loss. .C D G Em Everything else drains my love, .C D G G But you have raptured my heart.
[C3] .C D G Em Lord, I've seen thy preciousness, . C D G G Thy worth, thy reality; .C D G Em Now, my Lord, I must confess: . C D G G My heart is only for thee.
